pipelines.name: Content Calendar
pipelines.description: Generate a complete 30-day content calendar with posts, hooks, repurposed versions, hashtags, and visual briefs
pipelines.weeklyArc: Week 1: Awareness & Pain Points → Week 2: Education & Trust → Week 3: Story & Authority → Week 4: Conversion Push

activities.name: Collect Client Profile
activities.description: Gather all client information: brand, audience, tone, platforms, goals

prompts.en: Collect client profile following the schema. Ensure all required fields are completed before proceeding to Stage 1.
prompts.ar: جمع ملف العميل وفقاً للمخطط. التأكد من إكمال جميع الحقول المطلوبة قبل الانتقال للمرحلة 1.

activities.name: Profile Review & Approval
activities.description: Present profile to client for verification before generating content

prompts.en: Present the collected client profile for review. Confirm accuracy before proceeding.
prompts.ar: عرض ملف العميل للمراجعة. تأكيد الدقة قبل المتابعة.

activities.name: Generate 30 Content Ideas
activities.description: Create 30 strategic ideas across 5 pillars: Educational(8), Storytelling(6), Engagement(6), Authority(5), Promotional(5)
checklist: Each idea tagged with platform + format

prompts.en: Generate exactly 30 content ideas in 5 pillars following the content-calendar-generator stage 1 template. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{audience_demographics}}, {{audience_psychographics}}, {{pain_points}}, {{tone}}, {{platforms}}, {{content_goal}}.
prompts.ar: إنشاء 30 فكرة محتوى في 5 أعمدة وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 1. حقن بيانات العميل المناسبة.

activities.name: Select Ideas to Proceed
activities.description: Present ideas as kanban. User selects 15-30 ideas to continue with

prompts.en: Present ideas as a kanban with 5 columns (one per pillar). User selects 15-30 ideas to proceed.
prompts.ar: عرض الأفكار كـ kanban بـ 5 أعمدة. يختار المستخدم 15-30 فكرة للمتابعة.

activities.name: Generate Hooks per Idea
activities.description: For each selected idea, generate 8 hooks using psychological formulas: Curiosity Gap, Bold Contrarian, Pain-Point Mirror, Surprising Stat, Direct 'You', Story Opener, 'What If' Reframe, Social Proof
checklist: 1 hook selected per idea by user

prompts.en: For each selected idea, generate 8 hooks using the 8 formulas from content-calendar-generator stage 2. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{tone}}. Each hook must be under 20 words.
prompts.ar: لكل فكرة مختارة، إنشاء 8 خطافات باستخدام الـ 8 صيغ من المرحلة 2. حقن {{brand_name}}، {{niche}}، {{tone}}.

activities.name: Draft Full Posts
activities.description: Write complete ready-to-publish posts. Route by pillar: Educational(3A), Storytelling(3B), Engagement(3C), Authority(3D), Promotional(3E)

prompts.en: Write complete posts using stage 3 templates (3A-3E). Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{tone}}, {{content_goal}}. Apply platform formatting rules. Use selected hook as opener.
prompts.ar: كتابة منشورات كاملة باستخدام قوالب المرحلة 3 (3A-3E). تطبيق قواعد تنسيق المنصات. استخدام الخطاف المحدد كافتتاحية.

activities.name: Review & Adjust Posts
activities.description: User can regenerate, adjust tone (casual/professional/bold/friendly), or request translation

prompts.en: Present drafted posts for review. Offer options: Regenerate, Adjust Tone, Translate.
prompts.ar: عرض المسودات للمراجعة. خيارات: إعادة الإنشاء، تعديل النبرة، الترجمة.

activities.name: Build 30-Day Calendar
activities.description: Arrange posts into strategic 30-day calendar following weekly arc. Respect posting frequency, distribute platforms evenly, avoid consecutive same-pillar days

prompts.en: Build 30-day calendar following stage 4 template. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{platforms}}, {{posting_frequency}}, {{content_goal}}, {{month_label}}. Apply weekly arc rules. Return JSON array.
prompts.ar: بناء تقويم 30 يوم وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 4. تطبيق قواعد القوس الأسبوعي.

activities.name: Adapt for All Platforms
activities.description: Generate native adaptations for all other platforms per post. Adapted versions must feel native, not copy-paste

prompts.en: Adapt posts for all client platforms following stage 5 template. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{tone}}. Apply platform adaptation rules for Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, Facebook.
prompts.ar: تكييف المنشورات لجميع منصات العميل وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 5.

activities.name: Generate Hashtags & Keywords
activities.description: Platform-specific hashtags: Instagram(20-30), LinkedIn(3-5), X(1-3), TikTok(4-6), Facebook(3-5). Plus 5 SEO keywords per post

prompts.en: Generate hashtags following stage 6 template. Inject {{niche}}, {{platforms}}. Apply hashtag rules by platform. Include SEO keywords.
prompts.ar: إنشاء هاشتاقات وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 6. تطبيق قواعد الهاشتاقات حسب المنصة.

activities.name: Create Visual Direction Briefs
activities.description: Designer-ready briefs under 80 words each. Include visual_brief, suggested_style, color_suggestions, text_on_image

prompts.en: Create visual briefs following stage 7 template. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{niche}}, {{tone}}, {{platforms}}. Each brief under 80 words. Include visual_brief, suggested_style, color_suggestions, text_on_image.
prompts.ar: إنشاء ملخصات بصرية وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 7. كل ملخص أقل من 80 كلمة.

activities.name: Export Calendar
activities.description: Export as PDF or XLSX with all sheets: Calendar, Full Posts, Repurposed Versions, Hashtags & Briefs

prompts.en: Export calendar following stage 8 template. Option A: PDF with cover, TOC, calendar grid, post pages. Option B: XLSX with 4 sheets.
prompts.ar: تصدير التقويم وفقاً لقالب المرحلة 8. الخيار أ: PDF. الخيار ب: XLSX.

pipelines.name: Blog Post Writing
pipelines.description: Create a reader-first SEO blog post with SERP-informed planning, keyword strategy, AEO/GEO optimization, article draft, publishing checklist, and post-publish plan

activities.name: Confirm Blog Brief
activities.description: Confirm the main blog topic and primary focus keyword before drafting; collect secondary keywords when provided.
checklist: Main blog post topic is explicit
Target audience, tone, client context, and CTA goal noted
Missing required fields are requested before writing

prompts.en: Confirm the blog brief. Required before drafting: main blog post topic and primary focus keyword. Secondary keywords are optional. Use client context for audience, tone, product/service, and CTA if available.
prompts.ar: تأكيد موجز المقال. المطلوب قبل الكتابة: موضوع المقال والكلمة المفتاحية الرئيسية. الكلمات الثانوية اختيارية.

activities.name: Map Search Intent & SERP Pattern
activities.description: Use Serper live SERP data when available; otherwise mark live SERP evidence as unavailable and infer from the prompt/client context.
checklist: Winning format identified or marked unavailable
Top result angles summarized when search data is available
People Also Ask style questions proposed
Content gaps and differentiation angle documented

prompts.en: Study the primary keyword. If Serper search context is present, summarize top result formats, angles, snippets, People Also Ask questions, related searches, gaps, and source opportunities. If not present, clearly state live SERP data is unavailable and produce a best-practice research plan without inventing rankings or People Also Ask results.
prompts.ar: دراسة الكلمة المفتاحية الرئيسية. إذا توفرت نتائج البحث، لخص الشكل والزوايا والفجوات. إذا لم تتوفر، اذكر ذلك بوضوح ولا تخترع بيانات.

activities.name: Build SEO Package & Outline
activities.description: Plan the mandatory primary keyword and brand/company context, URL slug, meta description, TOC, H2/H3 structure, target length, key takeaways, FAQ, schema, visuals, and final post settings.
checklist: Primary Focus Keyword and Brand/Company Name confirmed before writing
SEO title tag under 60 characters where possible
Primary keyword near the beginning of at least one title
Recommended URL slug is lowercase, hyphenated, keyword-aligned, and date-free
Meta description is 150-155 characters with primary keyword and soft CTA
Outline uses one H1 and logical H2/H3 hierarchy
Primary keyword appears in at least one H2 naturally
Secondary keywords mapped to H2/H3 where they fit
TOC included for posts over 1,000 words
Key takeaways / TL;DR planned near the top
FAQ, schema, internal links, external links, image placement notes, and post SEO settings planned

prompts.en: Build the SEO package and outline using the complete writer checklist. Confirm Primary Focus Keyword and Brand/Company Name. Plan recommended slug, meta description, search intent notes, suggested word count, Quick Navigation anchors, the full 18-section article structure, key takeaways, FAQ plan, comparison table, case studies, visual plan, internal/external links, schema recommendation, and final Post SEO Settings.
prompts.ar: إنشاء حزمة SEO وهيكل المقال باستخدام قائمة التحقق الكاملة.

activities.name: Write Full Blog Post
activities.description: Draft the full 2,500+ word blog post with the exact high-scoring structure, reader-first depth, short paragraphs, direct answer, keyword discipline, E-E-A-T, FAQ, comparison table, case studies, and CTA.
checklist: Primary keyword appears naturally in first 100 words
Intro includes a 40-60 word direct answer
Paragraphs are mostly 1-3 sentences and never wall-of-text
Primary keyword density stays natural and below spam threshold
Comparison tables, lists, or callouts included where useful
E-E-A-T signals, source/citation placeholders, and methodology notes included where relevant
At least one image placement note per major section where appropriate
Article includes urgency, summary, about brand, author bio, footer, and clear CTA

prompts.en: Write the full 2,500+ word blog post. Optimize for readers first, search engines second. Follow the exact structure: H1/header, Quick Navigation, Key Takeaways, What is/definition, step-by-step process, complete value section, Why choose brand, FAQ part 1, FAQ part 2, comparison table, three case studies, getting started/packages, future technology, technical FAQ, urgency, CTA, summary, about brand/author, footer. Keep the Article Draft copy-paste-ready and put SEO settings only in the final Post SEO Settings section. Do not keyword-stuff.
prompts.ar: كتابة المقال كاملاً للقارئ أولاً ثم محركات البحث. تضمين إجابة مباشرة وملخص وجدول محتويات وأسئلة شائعة ودعوة لاتخاذ إجراء.

activities.name: Run Full Writer Checklist
activities.description: Review the article against title, slug, meta, intro, headings, TOC, readability, links, visuals, accessibility, AEO/GEO, schema, and post-publish checklist.
checklist: Title, slug, and meta description satisfy checklist
TOC and key takeaways are present
Internal and external link suggestions are descriptive
Visual alt text suggestions include primary keyword naturally at least once
Article schema and FAQ schema guidance included
After-publish and long-term maintenance checklist included

prompts.en: Perform a final optimization pass using every checklist item in the content writer guide. Return a client-ready blog deliverable with SEO package, article draft, FAQ, links, visual/alt text plan, schema guidance, pre-publish checklist, post-publish plan, and maintenance notes.
prompts.ar: إجراء مراجعة نهائية وفقاً لكل عناصر قائمة التحقق وتقديم مقال جاهز للعميل.

pipelines.name: Campaign Brief
pipelines.description: Standard workflow for creating a complete campaign from client intake to approved strategy

activities.name: Client Brief Collection
activities.description: Gather all client information, goals, and requirements

prompts.en: Collect comprehensive client brief. Confirm business objectives, target audience, budget, timeline, and stakeholders.
prompts.ar: جمع موجز العميل الشامل. تأكيد الأهداف، الجمهور المستهدف، الميزانية، الجدول الزمني.

activities.name: Background Research
activities.description: Deep dive into client's business, market position, and competitive landscape

prompts.en: Conduct background research on client. Include company history, market position, competitive landscape, SWOT analysis.
prompts.ar: إجراء بحث أولي عن العميل. تشمل: تاريخ الشركة، الموقع في السوق، المشهد التنافسي، تحليل SWOT.

activities.name: Target Audience Deep Dive
activities.description: Create detailed audience personas and journey maps

prompts.en: Create detailed audience personas and customer journey maps. Inject {{target_audience}}, {{business_objectives}}.
prompts.ar: إنشاء شخصيات جمهور مفصلة وخرائط رحلة العميل.

activities.name: Competitive Positioning
activities.description: Define unique positioning and differentiation strategy

prompts.en: Define competitive positioning and differentiation. Inject {{industry}}, {{product_service}}, {{competitive_landscape}}.
prompts.ar: تحديد الموقع التنافسي والتميز. حقن {{industry}}، {{product_service}}.

activities.name: Campaign Strategy
activities.description: Develop campaign concept, themes, and strategic framework

prompts.en: Develop comprehensive campaign strategy. Include concept, themes, channel strategy, KPIs. Inject {{business_objectives}}, {{budget_range}}.
prompts.ar: تطوير استراتيجية حملة شاملة. تشمل: المفهوم، الموضوعات، استراتيجية القنوات، مؤشرات الأداء.

activities.name: Creative Direction
activities.description: Define visual and copy direction for the campaign

prompts.en: Define creative direction. Include visual style, copy tone, key messages, platform requirements, asset specs. Inject {{brand_name}}, {{tone}}.
prompts.ar: تحديد الاتجاه الإبداعي. تشمل: الأسلوب البصري، نبرة النسخ، الرسائل الرئيسية.

activities.name: Content Creation
activities.description: Produce all campaign copy and content

prompts.en: Produce all campaign copy. Inject {{campaign_theme}}, {{brand_voice}}, {{target_audience}}. Include all required fields per platform.
prompts.ar: إنتاج جميع نسخ الحملة. حقن {{campaign_theme}}، {{brand_voice}}، {{target_audience}}.

activities.name: Visual Production
activities.description: Create all visual assets per specifications

prompts.en: Create all visual assets per specifications. Inject {{visual_direction}}, {{asset_specs}}. Ensure accessibility compliance.
prompts.ar: إنشاء جميع الأصول البصرية. ضمان الامتثال للوصولية.

activities.name: Internal QA
activities.description: Cross-functional review before client presentation

prompts.en: Conduct internal QA review. Check completeness, brand compliance, proofreading, technical specs.
prompts.ar: إجراء مراجعة جودة داخلية. فحص الاكتمال، الامتثال للعلامة التجارية، التدقيق اللغوي.

activities.name: Client Presentation
activities.description: Present strategy and creative to client for approval

prompts.en: Present campaign strategy and creative to client. Prepare deck, talking points, alternatives, feedback mechanism.
prompts.ar: عرض استراتيجية الحملة والإبداع على العميل. تحضير العرض، نقاط الحديث، البدائل.

activities.name: Media Planning
activities.description: Finalize media plan and channel strategy

prompts.en: Finalize media plan. Inject {{budget_range}}, {{timeline}}, {{channel_strategy}}. Define channel allocation, bidding strategy, tracking.
prompts.ar: تحديد الخطة الإعلامية النهائية. حقن {{budget_range}}، {{timeline}}.

activities.name: Campaign Launch
activities.description: Execute campaign launch across all channels

prompts.en: Execute campaign launch. Verify all assets uploaded, campaigns live, tracking working, stakeholders notified.
prompts.ar: تنفيذ إطلاق الحملة. التحقق من رفع جميع الأصول، عمل الحملات، عمل التتبع.

pipelines.name: Ad Creative Production
pipelines.description: End-to-end workflow for producing high-performance ad creatives with A/B testing

activities.name: Audience & Objective Definition
activities.description: Define target audience and campaign objectives

prompts.en: Define ad campaign brief. Inject {{campaign_objective}}, {{target_audience}}, {{primary_platform}}. Include targeting specs.
prompts.ar: تحديد موجز حملة الإعلانات. حقن {{campaign_objective}}، {{target_audience}}.

activities.name: Creative Concepts
activities.description: Develop multiple creative concepts for testing

prompts.en: Develop 3+ creative concepts. Inject {{product_service}}, {{campaign_objective}}, {{target_audience}}. Each concept needs unique hook, value prop, CTA, visual approach.
prompts.ar: تطوير 3+ مفاهيم إبداعية. حقن {{product_service}}، {{campaign_objective}}.

activities.name: Copy & Visual Pairing
activities.description: Create all copy variants and pair with visuals

prompts.en: Create ad copy variants. Inject {{creative_concepts}}, {{primary_platform}}. Apply platform ad specs. Include headline, body, CTA.
prompts.ar: إنشاء متغيرات نسخ الإعلانات. تطبيق مواصفات المنصة.

activities.name: Visual Production
activities.description: Create all visual assets

prompts.en: Create all visual assets per specs. Inject {{ad_formats}}, {{visual_specs}}. Ensure platform specs met.
prompts.ar: إنشاء جميع الأصول البصرية. ضمان استيفاء مواصفات المنصة.

activities.name: A/B Test Setup
activities.description: Configure and launch A/B tests

prompts.en: Configure A/B tests. Define test split, significance target, duration, success metrics. Inject {{budget}}.
prompts.ar: تكوين اختبارات A/B. تحديد انقسام الاختبار، هدف الأهمية، المدة.

activities.name: Performance Analysis
activities.description: Analyze test results and scale winners

prompts.en: Analyze A/B test results. Identify winners, reallocate budget, document learnings. Inject {{test_results}}.
prompts.ar: تحليل نتائج اختبار A/B. تحديد الفائزين، إعادة تخصيص الميزانية.

pipelines.name: Full Website Audit & SEO Strategy
pipelines.description: Pinpointer-style 10-point website audit covering SEO, UX, UI, CRO, accessibility, performance, content quality, security, mobile responsiveness, and competitive benchmarking.

activities.name: Confirm Audit URL and Scope
activities.description: Validate that the request contains the website URL and define the audit scope before any analysis begins.
checklist: Website URL is present and normalized with http or https
Audit goal is classified as full audit, SEO, performance, UX/UI, or conversion
Client context, industry, objectives, target keywords, and known competitors are captured when available
If the URL is missing, Iris asks for the URL instead of starting the task

prompts.en: Confirm the target URL before starting. If {{website_url}} is missing, stop and ask: "Please send me the website URL you want me to audit." If present, normalize it and summarize audit scope, client context, business objective, target keywords, and competitors.

activities.name: Collect Website Evidence
activities.description: Gather page-level evidence needed for a data-first website audit.
checklist: Page title, meta description, canonical, robots, Open Graph, headings, links, images, forms, CTAs, and structured data reviewed
Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse-style signals considered where available
Security headers, HTTPS, viewport, language, and accessibility basics reviewed
Findings distinguish observed evidence from inferred recommendations

prompts.en: Review {{website_url}} like a website auditor. Capture evidence for title, meta description, canonical, headings, content depth, internal/external links, image alt text, Open Graph, schema, robots/sitemap, HTTPS, security headers, viewport, forms, CTAs, social proof, page speed signals, mobile behavior, and competitor/industry expectations. If live crawling tools are unavailable, state the evidence limitations and still produce a structured best-effort audit from available page/request/client context.

activities.name: SEO Analyzer
activities.description: Score and interpret basic SEO, additional SEO, title readability, content readability, and technical SEO.
checklist: Title, meta description, URL, H1, headings, content length, alt text, links, canonical, schema, Open Graph, robots, sitemap, HTTPS, and Lighthouse SEO considered
Critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and recommendations produced
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 15 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Pinpointer-style SEO Analyzer section. Include score /100, automated checks summary, critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and up to 5 recommendations with priority, action, impact, and effort. Reference actual evidence whenever available.

activities.name: UX & Usability Auditor
activities.description: Evaluate navigation, information architecture, content hierarchy, user flow, cognitive load, trust signals, and inclusive usability.
checklist: Task completion, CTA clarity, form friction, cognitive load, trust signals, and accessibility considered
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 12 percent

prompts.en: Produce a UX & Usability audit section with category score /100, evidence-based findings, user impact, location when inferable, and concrete fixes. Use the framework: navigation and IA, content hierarchy, user flow, cognitive load, trust and credibility, accessibility and inclusivity.

activities.name: UI Design Auditor
activities.description: Evaluate visual design quality, typography, color and contrast, layout spacing, and interactive elements.
checklist: Visual maturity, consistency, brand expression, typography, color/contrast, spacing, layout, and interactive states reviewed
If screenshot evidence is unavailable, limitations are stated
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 10 percent

prompts.en: Produce a UI Design audit section. Evaluate visual design quality, typography, color/contrast, layout and spacing, and interactive elements. Be specific, professional, and evidence-aware. Do not pretend to have seen a screenshot if one was not available.

activities.name: Conversion Analyzer
activities.description: Assess value proposition, CTA strategy, trust proof, friction, and persuasion flow.
checklist: CTA prominence, copy, hierarchy, and repetition reviewed
Trust proof, forms, objections, pricing/next-step clarity, and persuasion sequence reviewed
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 12 percent

prompts.en: Produce a CRO Analyzer section. Include score /100, biggest conversion leak, quick wins, critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and recommendations with priority, action, impact, and effort.

activities.name: Accessibility Auditor
activities.description: Audit WCAG-oriented perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust accessibility signals.
checklist: Alt text, language, viewport, zoom behavior, forms, semantic structure, and Lighthouse accessibility considered
Findings reference WCAG criteria when possible
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 10 percent

prompts.en: Produce an Accessibility Auditor section using WCAG language. Include score /100, estimated WCAG level, critical barriers, warnings, passed checks, and prioritized fixes with WCAG references where possible.

activities.name: Performance Analyzer
activities.description: Analyze Core Web Vitals, resource optimization, loading strategy, and server/infrastructure signals.
checklist: LCP, FCP, TBT/INP, CLS, speed index, resource count, image optimization, lazy loading, render blocking, compression, caching, and CDN considered
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 12 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Performance Analyzer section. Include score /100, Core Web Vitals table when data is available, automated checks, critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and recommendations with estimated savings or expected impact.

activities.name: Content Quality Auditor
activities.description: Evaluate content clarity, structure, engagement, SEO alignment, and brand voice.
checklist: Content volume, headings, readability, media, internal linking, search intent, scannability, and voice consistency reviewed
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 10 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Content Quality section. Include score /100, content metrics, critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and recommendations. Assess readability, content strategy, engagement/media, SEO alignment, and brand voice.

activities.name: Security Auditor
activities.description: Review visible transport security, security headers, information disclosure, and cookie/session signals.
checklist: HTTPS, HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options/frame-ancestors, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, server disclosure, powered-by disclosure, cookies, and sensitive file exposure considered
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 8 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Security Auditor section. Include score /100, visible security posture, critical vulnerabilities or gaps, warnings, passed checks, and recommendations with risk if ignored.

activities.name: Mobile Responsiveness Auditor
activities.description: Evaluate viewport configuration, touch interaction, responsive layout, and mobile performance.
checklist: Viewport, pinch zoom, tap targets, mobile layout, responsive images, mobile navigation, forms, and mobile performance considered
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 6 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Mobile Responsiveness section. Include score /100, mobile-specific findings, Lighthouse mobile signals when available, critical issues, warnings, passed checks, and prioritized fixes.

activities.name: Competitive Benchmark
activities.description: Benchmark the site against industry standards and competitor expectations.
checklist: Industry standards, feature completeness, content competitiveness, and technical competitiveness reviewed
Known competitor URLs considered when provided
Score is 0-100 and weighted at 5 percent

prompts.en: Produce a Competitive Benchmark section. Include score /100, strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, competitive position, benchmark summary, and recommendations. Use competitor URLs if provided; otherwise compare against industry best practices.

activities.name: Weighted Scorecard
activities.description: Compile the 10 category scores into one overall weighted score.
checklist: Weights applied: SEO 15, UX 12, UI 10, CRO 12, Accessibility 10, Performance 12, Content 10, Security 8, Mobile 6, Benchmark 5
Score labels applied: Excellent 90+, Good 70-89, Fair 40-69, Poor below 40

prompts.en: Create the weighted category scorecard. Use this exact category order: SEO, UX & Usability, UI Design, Conversion, Accessibility, Performance, Content, Security, Mobile, Benchmark. Calculate or estimate one overall weighted score. Clearly mark evidence limitations if any category had incomplete data.

activities.name: Professional Audit Report
activities.description: Package the audit into a client-ready report matching the Pinpointer output structure.
checklist: Report header includes audited URL and generation date
Overall score and category score table are prominent
Executive summary is concise and commercially useful
Top priorities are ranked and action-oriented
Each category includes automated checks, AI insights/actions, recommendations, and score

prompts.en: Produce the final client-ready report in polished markdown. Required structure: # Website Audit Report: {{website_url}}; ## Overall Score; ## Category Scores; ## Executive Summary; ## Top Priorities; ## Category Deep Dives; ### SEO; ### UX & Usability; ### UI Design; ### Conversion; ### Accessibility; ### Performance; ### Content Quality; ### Security; ### Mobile Responsiveness; ### Competitive Benchmark; ## 30/60/90 Roadmap; ## Evidence Appendix. Make the output feel like a professional auditor dashboard: use tables, score labels, severity tags, pass/warning/fail summaries, exact fixes, expected impact, and effort. Do not provide generic advice.

activities.name: Competitor Mapping
activities.description: Identify all relevant competitors

prompts.en: Map all relevant competitors. Inject {{industry}}, {{product_service}}. Identify direct, indirect, map market share.
prompts.ar: رسم خريطة جميع المنافسين المعنيين. تحديد المنافسين المباشرين وغير المباشرين.

activities.name: Digital Presence Analysis
activities.description: Analyze competitor websites and digital presence

prompts.en: Analyze competitor digital presence. Inject {{competitor_list}}. Review website UX, content, SEO, social, paid ads.
prompts.ar: تحليل التواجد الرقمي للمنافسين. فحص موقع الويب، المحتوى، SEO، الاجتماعي.

activities.name: Marketing Strategy Analysis
activities.description: Deep dive into competitor marketing approaches

prompts.en: Analyze competitor marketing strategies. Inject {{research_focus}}. Compare positioning, messaging, campaigns, pricing. Complete SWOT.
prompts.ar: تحليل استراتيجيات تسويق المنافسين. مقارنة المواقع، الرسائل، الحملات، التسعير. إكمال SWOT.

activities.name: Competitor Report
activities.description: Compile comprehensive competitor report

prompts.en: Compile comprehensive competitor report. Include executive summary, detailed findings, opportunities, prioritized recommendations, action plan. Inject {{brand_name}}.
prompts.ar: تجميع تقرير شامل عن المنافسين. تشمل الملخص التنفيذي، النتائج التفصيلية، الفرص، التوصيات.

pipelines.name: AI Media Planning Methodology
pipelines.description: Create an objective-sensitive, country-aware media strategy and Excel-ready media plan with benchmark forecasts, measurement logic, and optimization rules.

clientProfileFields.label: Total Media Budget or Budget Range

activities.name: Campaign Brief Extraction
activities.description: Convert the user request and client profile into a structured media brief before planning starts.
checklist: Brand, industry, countries, product/service, objective, budget, timing, and audience are extracted when present
Multiple countries are preserved as separate planning markets
Mandatory channels, excluded channels, constraints, KPI targets, and tracking readiness are captured
No field is requested again if it is already present in the user prompt or client profile
Assumptions are explicit and separated from confirmed facts

prompts.en: You are a senior media planning intake specialist. Extract a structured media brief from the confirmed user request and client context. Capture: brand, industry, countries[], primary objective, secondary objectives, product/service, landing destination, audience, budget, currency, duration or flight dates, mandatory channels, excluded channels, KPI targets, creative assets, tracking readiness, and constraints. Preserve multiple countries as an array and do not collapse them into a single region. If a value is missing but inferable from client context, mark it as an assumption. Do not create the plan yet; output a clean structured brief plus the assumptions list.
prompts.ar: استخرج موجزًا إعلاميًا منظمًا من طلب المستخدم وسياق العميل، مع الحفاظ على تعدد الدول وتوضيح الافتراضات دون إنشاء الخطة بعد.

activities.name: Objective, Funnel & KPI Hierarchy
activities.description: Map the campaign objective to funnel stages, platform objectives, and KPI hierarchy.
checklist: Awareness maps to TOFU with reach, impressions, CPM, frequency, and video views
Traffic and engagement map to MOFU with clicks, landing-page views, engagement rate, CPC, CPE, and view metrics
Lead generation, app downloads, and sales map to BOFU with CPL, CPI, CPA, ROAS, CVR, and qualified outcomes
Retention maps to post-purchase with CRM reach, repeat purchase, reactivation, LTV, and ROAS
Primary KPI and 2-4 secondary KPIs are defined for the stated objective

prompts.en: Map the confirmed objective to funnel stage, recommended platform objectives, primary KPI, secondary KPIs, and success definition. Use this logic: Awareness/Reach = TOFU and buys reach, impressions, CPM, frequency, video views; Engagement = TOFU-MOFU and buys post engagement, video views, CPE; Traffic = MOFU and buys clicks, landing-page views, CPC; Lead Generation = MOFU-BOFU and buys leads, CPL, instant forms or website leads; App Downloads = BOFU and buys installs, CPI, in-app events; Sales/Conversions = BOFU and buys purchases, ROAS, CPA, conversion value; Retention = post-purchase and buys CRM reach, reactivation, repeat purchase, LTV. Explain how this objective changes the media mix.
prompts.ar: اربط الهدف بمرحلة القمع، أهداف المنصات، مؤشرات الأداء الأساسية والثانوية، وتعريف النجاح.

activities.name: Prospecting, Retargeting & Exclusions
activities.description: Define the audience architecture by market and funnel stage.
checklist: Core audience is defined by country, language, demographics, interests, intent, and behavior
Prospecting and retargeting audiences are separated
Exclusions are added to prevent waste and audience overlap
B2B plans prioritize job title, company, industry, ABM, and LinkedIn where viable
B2C plans prioritize behavior, interest, lookalike, intent, creator, and platform-native signals

prompts.en: Create the target audience strategy for each country and objective. Include core audience, prospecting segments, retargeting segments, exclusions, CRM/lookalike opportunities, platform audience signals, language and local considerations, and any culturally relevant media behaviors. Keep audience logic tied to the client context and the product/service being promoted.
prompts.ar: أنشئ استراتيجية الجمهور لكل دولة وهدف، مع تقسيم الاستهداف، إعادة الاستهداف، الاستبعادات، والإشارات الخاصة بكل منصة.

activities.name: Objective-Sensitive Channel Shortlist
activities.description: Score channels by objective, audience, cost, creative, measurement, market, and industry fit.
checklist: Each channel receives 1-5 scores for objective fit, audience fit, cost efficiency, creative fit, and measurement fit
Channels scoring below 3 are excluded unless mandatory or strategically justified
Industry modifiers are applied for healthcare, FMCG, real estate, education, banking/fintech, ecommerce, B2B, travel, and apps
Country/media behavior is considered, including Snapchat/TikTok for youth-skewing GCC briefs and LinkedIn for B2B in UAE/KSA
Mandatory and excluded channels from the brief are respected

prompts.en: Score these channels for the brief: Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, YouTube, Google Search, Google Display, LinkedIn, Programmatic Display/CTV, Amazon Ads, Influencers, CRM/Email/SMS/WhatsApp. Score objective fit, audience fit, cost efficiency, creative fit, and measurement fit from 1-5. Apply industry overlays: healthcare needs trust/compliance and often Search + Meta Leads + YouTube; FMCG/restaurants favor mass social/video/influencers; real estate tolerates higher CPL and needs Search + Meta Leads + YouTube + retargeting; education is seasonal and lead-driven; banking/fintech needs compliance and trust; ecommerce needs Shopping/PMax/Search/Meta/TikTok/retargeting; B2B needs Search + LinkedIn/ABM when budget supports it; travel needs Search + video/social/influencers. Recommend only channels with a clear objective-country-industry rationale.
prompts.ar: قيّم القنوات حسب ملاءمة الهدف والجمهور والتكلفة والإبداع والقياس، ثم اختر القنوات ذات المبرر القوي.

activities.name: Platform Objectives, Formats & Buying Models
activities.description: Choose ad formats, placements, platform objectives, and buying types for each shortlisted channel.
checklist: Awareness uses CPM, reach/frequency, reservation, CPV, or video reach where appropriate
Traffic uses CPC or CPM optimized for clicks/landing-page views
Engagement uses CPE, engagement optimization, video views, ThruPlay, or community interaction
Leads/sales/apps use conversion bidding only when tracking volume is sufficient
Creative asset requirements are stated for every channel

prompts.en: For every recommended channel, choose the exact platform campaign objective, ad format, placement, and buying type. Use CPM/reach-frequency/reservation/CPV for awareness and video; CPC/landing-page views for traffic; CPE/video views/community interaction for engagement; CPL/conversion bidding for leads; CPI/in-app event bidding for apps; CPA/ROAS/value bidding for sales when tracking volume supports it. Include required creative assets and any tracking dependency for each channel.
prompts.ar: حدد هدف المنصة، الصيغة الإعلانية، المواضع، ونوع الشراء لكل قناة حسب الهدف وحجم التتبع.

activities.name: Funnel, Country & Channel Budget Allocation
activities.description: Allocate budget using objective weights, channel scores, country cost levels, industry modifiers, and testing buffer.
checklist: Budget is allocated across countries, funnel stages, channels, and flights
Balanced full-funnel plans use roughly 40-50% TOFU, 30-35% MOFU, 20-25% BOFU
Pure awareness briefs push roughly 70-80% into TOFU reach/video channels
Lead/sales/app briefs push roughly 60-70% into MOFU/BOFU with a small prospecting layer
A 10-20% testing/optimization buffer is reserved when the budget allows it
Line items below viable learning budget are flagged instead of hidden

prompts.en: Allocate the confirmed budget across countries, funnel stages, channels, and flights. Start with objective-sensitive funnel weights, then adjust by country cost, channel score, industry competitiveness, market maturity, tracking readiness, and expected KPI. Reserve 10-20% for testing unless the budget is too small. Flag any fragmented or below-learning-budget line item. Ensure all budget percentages sum to 100%.
prompts.ar: وزّع الميزانية حسب الدول، مراحل القمع، القنوات، وفترات الحملة مع ضمان أن النسب تساوي 100%.

activities.name: Benchmark Cost & KPI Forecast
activities.description: Forecast delivery and outcomes using country-format benchmarks, industry modifiers, and explicit assumptions.
checklist: Benchmarks use country-format planning estimates and confidence levels
Impressions = budget / CPM * 1000 where CPM applies
Clicks = impressions * CTR or budget / CPC where CPC applies
Leads/actions/conversions = clicks * CVR or budget / benchmark cost per result where applicable
Primary KPI, forecasted outcome, cost per result, and assumptions are shown for every row
Seasonality, Ramadan/Q4/national day pressure, and currency caveats are stated when relevant

prompts.en: Forecast delivery for every media row using country and format benchmarks. Use these directional benchmark anchors unless better client/platform data is provided: Jordan social CPM 3.5, YouTube 4, display 2.3, short-video 2.8, search CPC 0.35 USD; Oman social CPM 6.5, YouTube 7.2, display 4.2, short-video 5.2, search CPC 0.65; Iraq social CPM 2.2, YouTube 2.7, display 1.5, short-video 1.9, search CPC 0.25; Saudi Arabia social CPM 12.01, YouTube 13.2, display 7.8, short-video 9.6, search CPC 1.2; Qatar social CPM 12.67, YouTube 14, display 8.2, short-video 10.1, search CPC 1.3; Egypt social CPM 1.81, YouTube 2.3, display 1.2, short-video 1.55, search CPC 0.18; USA social CPM 16.08, YouTube 18, display 10.4, short-video 12.9, search CPC 2.5. Apply industry modifiers where relevant: healthcare 1.20, FMCG/restaurants 0.95, real estate 1.25, education 1.15, banking/fintech 1.30, ecommerce/retail 1.10, B2B services 1.35, travel/tourism 1.10, apps/digital products 1.15. Calculate impressions, clicks, primary outcomes, CTR/CVR assumptions, cost per result, and confidence level. Mark estimates as planning benchmarks, not guarantees.
prompts.ar: توقع التسليم والنتائج لكل بند باستخدام معايير تكلفة حسب الدولة والصيغة، مع توضيح المعادلات ومستوى الثقة.

activities.name: Flighting, Pacing & Frequency
activities.description: Choose the scheduling model, pacing logic, and frequency guardrails.
checklist: Continuity is used for always-on or non-seasonal campaigns
Flighting is used for seasonal or limited campaigns
Pulsing is used for always-on campaigns with peak bursts
Seasonal/roadblock logic is used for launches and tentpole moments
Frequency caps are set in a safe 3-7 exposure band unless the format requires otherwise
Optimization windows avoid premature changes during learning

prompts.en: Choose the scheduling model: continuity, flighting, pulsing, seasonal burst, roadblock, or launch burst. Define flight dates, daily/weekly pacing logic, frequency caps, campaign phases, learning windows, and optimization checkpoints. Explain why the schedule fits the objective, country mix, product/service, and budget.
prompts.ar: اختر نموذج الجدولة، الإيقاع، حدود التكرار، ونوافذ التحسين بناءً على الهدف والدول والميزانية.

activities.name: Tracking, Reporting & Optimization Playbook
activities.description: Define measurement requirements and post-launch optimization rules.
checklist: UTM naming and conversion events are included
BOFU optimization is not recommended unless tracking exists or can be implemented
Pacing, frequency, CTR, CPC, CPM, CPL, CPA, ROAS, creative fatigue, and audience overlap rules are included
Rules explain when not to make changes because learning volume is insufficient

prompts.en: Build the measurement and optimization plan. Include platform pixel/tag/CAPI/GA4/app SDK/MMP/CRM needs, conversion events, UTM taxonomy, attribution window, reporting cadence, lead handling or ecommerce event requirements, optimization triggers, pacing rules, creative fatigue rules, budget shift rules, audience overlap checks, and learning-phase guardrails. Be specific to the selected channels and objective.
prompts.ar: أنشئ خطة القياس والتحسين مع متطلبات التتبع، الأحداث، UTMs، قواعد الإيقاع، وتبديل الميزانية.

activities.name: Budget, KPI & Feasibility Validation
activities.description: Stress-test the plan before final output.
checklist: Every row has country, funnel stage, channel, platform objective, format, buying type, budget, KPI, forecast, tracking requirement, and rationale
Forecast assumptions and benchmark confidence are stated
Low-confidence benchmarks, weak tracking, and underfunded channels are flagged
Plan is revised before final output if any major QA issue is found

prompts.en: Run a strict media planning QA pass. Check budget totals, country coverage, objective-KPI fit, channel eligibility, benchmark confidence, tracking readiness, learning-phase feasibility, over-fragmented budgets, missing rationale, and forecast completeness. If a problem is found, revise the plan before final delivery. Output only the QA findings and required corrections.
prompts.ar: راجع الخطة بدقة للتأكد من الميزانية، الملاءمة، التتبع، التوقعات، والمخاطر قبل التسليم.

activities.name: Client-Ready Media Plan
activities.description: Compile the final strategy narrative and workbook-ready plan table.
checklist: Final output has exactly two major sections: Media Plan Strategy and Excel-Ready Media Plan
Strategy covers campaign overview, objective/funnel logic, audiences, channel rationale, budget, forecast, flighting, measurement, risks, and next steps
Excel-ready plan uses one complete markdown pipe table with the required workbook columns
Rows support multiple countries and show budget, benchmark, forecast, KPI, tracking requirement, and source/assumption
The plan is client-specific, concrete, and avoids generic channel advice

prompts.en: Generate the final client-ready media plan. Use exactly two major sections: ## Media Plan Strategy and ## Excel-Ready Media Plan. The strategy must include campaign overview, objective-to-funnel logic, audience strategy, channel-selection rationale with fit scores, budget allocation by country/funnel/channel, forecasted headline KPIs, scheduling model, measurement setup, optimization rules, risks/assumptions, and immediate next steps. The Excel-ready section must contain one complete markdown table using the defined schema and no extra split tables. Make the output specific to the client, countries, objective, audience, industry, product/service, and budget.
prompts.ar: أنشئ الخطة النهائية بقسمين فقط: استراتيجية الخطة الإعلامية وجدول إعلامي جاهز للتصدير إلى Excel.

pipelines.name: Strategy Brief
pipelines.description: Structured workflow for producing a high-quality brand or campaign strategy brief with research, positioning, and recommendations

activities.name: Clarify Strategic Objective
activities.description: Synthesize the task into a sharp strategic problem statement and success criteria
checklist: Decision to be made is explicit

prompts.en: Clarify the strategic objective for {{brand_name}} in {{industry}}. Summarize the client situation, the core decision to solve, and the success criteria.
prompts.ar: توضيح الهدف الاستراتيجي للعميل وتحديد معايير النجاح.

activities.name: Audience and Market Insight
activities.description: Surface audience motivations, category dynamics, and commercial implications

prompts.en: Create an insight summary for {{brand_name}}. Use {{target_audience}}, {{business_objectives}}, and {{competitive_landscape}} to identify meaningful audience and market insights.
prompts.ar: إنشاء ملخص رؤى للجمهور والسوق.

activities.name: Build Positioning Direction
activities.description: Develop the recommended strategic angle, message territory, and differentiation logic

prompts.en: Build a strategic positioning direction for {{brand_name}} using {{product_service}}, {{target_audience}}, {{business_objectives}}, and {{competitive_landscape}}.
prompts.ar: بناء اتجاه تموضع استراتيجي ورسائل رئيسية.

activities.name: Internal Strategic QA
activities.description: Check the strategy for logic, clarity, client relevance, and presentation readiness

prompts.en: Review the strategy output for clarity, logic, actionability, and client readiness for {{brand_name}}.
prompts.ar: مراجعة الاستراتيجية للتأكد من الوضوح والجاهزية للعميل.

pipelines.name: Client Brief
pipelines.description: Structured intake workflow for turning client information into a usable agency brief with strategy-ready context

activities.name: Client Context Consolidation
activities.description: Consolidate company, audience, offer, and objective details into a clear intake summary

prompts.en: Create a concise intake summary for {{brand_name}} using {{industry}}, {{product_service}}, {{target_audience}}, and {{business_objectives}}.
prompts.ar: إنشاء ملخص استيعاب أولي للعميل.

activities.name: Message and Priority Framing
activities.description: Translate intake notes into agency-ready messaging priorities and strategic watchouts

prompts.en: Frame the messaging priorities for {{brand_name}} using {{tone}}, {{competitive_landscape}}, and {{business_objectives}}.
prompts.ar: صياغة أولويات الرسائل والاعتبارات الاستراتيجية.

activities.name: Agency Brief Finalization
activities.description: Package the intake and strategic framing into a clean client brief for downstream teams
checklist: Ready for strategy, creative, or media teams

prompts.en: Finalize an agency-ready client brief for {{brand_name}} using the intake summary and messaging priorities.
prompts.ar: إعداد موجز عميل نهائي جاهز للوكالة.
